name: KeepWell Weekly Reflection
description: Prompts the user for a weekly wellness self-assessment across all 8 dimensions every Friday.

then.prompt:
Initiate a KeepWell Weekly Reflection. Ask the user to rate each of the 8 wellness dimensions (1-5) using this format:

This week's wellness check:
🏃 Physical: How was your energy and movement?
💭 Emotional: How was your mood stability?
💼 Occupational: Did work feel meaningful?
🤝 Social: Did you feel connected to others?
📖 Intellectual: Did you learn something new?
🌿 Environmental: Was your workspace comfortable?
💰 Financial: Any money-related stress?
✨ Spiritual: Did you feel aligned with your values?

After the user responds, provide 2-3 brief observations and suggest one micro-goal for next week. Reference relevant science (SDT, JD-R model, or ART) where appropriate.
